evidence: Browser validation opened the HTML at mobile 390x844, tablet 768x1024 and desktop 1366x900.
Console errors: none. Page errors: none.
Main interactions tested: role selection and safety checklist; theme/question validation; slide ordering; Canva tool matching; Markdown generation and mailto link.
No script src, stylesheet link, remote image, CDN, @import or googleapis dependency detected.
Mobile/tablet/desktop body width stayed within viewport after overflow fix.
acceptance_checks: At least one principal interaction works; five interaction paths tested
Layout usable on mobile, tablet and desktop
Objective, exploration, feedback and assessment coherent with DocSpec
Offline/self-contained implementation; external Canva links are optional hrefs only
